# saas_collab corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === ClickUp ===
# expect: ClickUp Personal Access Token
token pk_12345678_AB1CD2EF3GH4IJ5KL6MN7OP8QR9ST0UV1WXYZ here

# === Airtable ===
# expect: Airtable Personal Access Token
# expect: Airtable Legacy API Key
pat patmrNEbCdEfGhIj0.aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWX0000 here
Authorization: Bearer keyAbCdEfGhIjKlMn here

# === Contentful ===
# expect: Contentful Content Management PAT
token CFPAT-aBcDeFg1234567890aBcDeFg1234567890aBcD0000 here

# === Dropbox ===
# expect: Dropbox Short-Lived OAuth Token
token sl.AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhNr8Pp-AucTz_J1sX05bhN here

# === ServiceNow ===
# expect: ServiceNow Instance URL
instance https://acme.service-now.com here

# === Zendesk ===
# expect: Zendesk API Token (email/token)
basic agent@acme.com/token:AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA here

# === Notion ===
# expect: Notion Integration Token
token secret_AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf012345 here

# === Linear ===
# expect: Linear API Key
key lin_api_AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf012345 here

# === Asana ===
# expect: Asana Personal Access Token
token 1/1234567890123456:AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789 here

# === Dropbox Refresh Token (Block 3b) ===
# expect: Dropbox Refresh Token
abcdef01234AAAAAAAAAAZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ
